# dist-standalone-install — Standalone Binary Distribution

This directory is the distribution target for standalone binaries built via PyOxidizer.

After running `./scripts/build_standalone.sh`, the output appears in `dist-standalone/` (at the repo root). This directory (`dist-standalone-install/`) serves as the install/packaging reference for those binaries.

## Output (generated by build_standalone.sh)

```
dist-standalone/
├── board-manager/
│   ├── board-manager       # ~51 MB standalone binary
│   ├── prefix/             # ~100 MB sidecar (C extensions)
│   └── board-manager.tar.gz
├── arduino-dash/
│   ├── arduino-dash
│   ├── prefix/
│   └── arduino-dash.tar.gz
└── medminder-dash/
    ├── medminder-dash
    ├── prefix/
    └── medminder-dash.tar.gz
```

## Running Standalone Binaries

```bash
# Board Manager Service
dist-standalone/board-manager/board-manager --port 50051

# Arduino Dashboard
dist-standalone/arduino-dash/arduino-dash

# MedMinder Dashboard
dist-standalone/medminder-dash/medminder-dash
```

All three support `--help`.

## Building

```bash
# Build all 3 apps
./scripts/build_standalone.sh

# Build a single app
./scripts/build_standalone.sh board-manager

# Via nox
nox -s build_standalone
nox -s build_standalone -- board-manager
```

## Requirements

- PyOxidizer — `pipx install pyoxidizer`
- Python 3.10 (bundled by PyOxidizer)
- All 6 monorepo wheels built — `nox -s all_builds`
